title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 143.371 - Nonresident estate or trust defined
text:
143.371.  Nonresident estate or trust defined. — A "nonresident estate or trust" means an estate or trust which is not a resident estate or trust as defined in section 143.331.
(L. 1972 S.B. 549) 
Effective 1-1-73, see § 143.109
